results.title: Inception
results.overview: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology.

results.title: The Dark Knight
results.overview: When the Joker wreaks havoc on Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest tests of his ability to fight injustice.

results.title: Interstellar
results.overview: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

results.title: The Matrix
results.overview: A computer hacker learns about the true nature of reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

results.title: Pulp Fiction
results.overview: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster and his wife intertwine in tales of violence and redemption.
